📋 Noyo Lite — Terms of Use ▼ read before ticking

1. Information Only

Noyo Lite is a free machine-finder tool for informational purposes only. All machine specifications, load data, and recommendations are provided as general guidance. You must verify all specifications with the relevant manufacturer or rental company before making any hire or operational decision.

2. No Quoting or Transactions

Noyo Lite does not facilitate any quotes, transactions, hire agreements, or direct contact with rental companies. No pricing, availability, or commercial information is provided.

3. No Liability

Noyo Pty Ltd accepts no responsibility for decisions made based on information provided through Noyo Lite. All information is provided as-is without warranty of any kind. You are solely responsible for verifying the suitability of any machine for your intended purpose.

4. Data Collection

Your registration details (name, email, phone, address, depot) are collected solely for the purpose of providing the Noyo Lite service and understanding regional machine demand. Your details will not be shared with rental companies or third parties.

5. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of New South Wales, Australia.

📋 Noyo Platform — Rental Company Terms & Conditions ▼ read before ticking

1. Platform Role — Introduction Only

Noyo Pty Ltd ("Noyo", "the Platform") operates solely as a digital introduction and lead-generation service. Noyo introduces customers who require plant and equipment hire to rental companies listed on the Platform. Noyo is not a party to any hire agreement, rental contract, or transaction between you and any customer.

2. No Responsibility for Transactions

Noyo bears absolutely no responsibility or liability of any kind for: (a) any rental agreement, contract, or arrangement entered into between you and a customer; (b) payments, non-payments, or payment defaults by any customer; (c) the creditworthiness, financial standing, or credit rating of any customer; (d) disputes, disagreements, or legal proceedings between you and any customer; (e) the fitness, suitability, or availability of any equipment for a customer's stated purpose.

3. No Responsibility for Transport & Logistics

All transport, delivery, collection, float costs, and logistics are entirely the responsibility of you and the customer. Noyo has no involvement and accepts no liability for transport arrangements, costs, delays, damage in transit, or any loss arising from the movement of equipment to or from any site.

4. Equipment Condition & Damage

Noyo accepts no responsibility for damage to equipment, loss of equipment, equipment breakdown, equipment unsuitability, accidents involving equipment, or any claim arising from the condition or use of equipment. All such matters are solely between you and the customer.

5. Distance & Location Estimates

All distances displayed on this Platform are approximate estimates only, calculated using air-distance or road-distance algorithms. These figures are not accurate navigation measurements and must not be relied upon for pricing, logistics planning, or any commercial decision. You must verify all distances and transport costs independently before quoting.

6. Enquiry Routing & Lead Quality

Noyo does not guarantee the quality, accuracy, or seriousness of any enquiry routed to you. All information provided by customers (including site addresses, machine requirements, hire duration, and business details) is provided by the customer and has not been verified by Noyo. You must conduct your own due diligence before quoting or committing to any job.

7. No Guarantee of Business

Noyo makes no guarantee that you will receive any minimum number of enquiries, leads, or jobs. Listing on the Platform does not guarantee any business outcome.

8. Pricing & Quote Accuracy

All pricing, quotes, and estimates you provide through the Platform are your sole responsibility. Noyo accepts no responsibility for quoting errors, underquoting, overquoting, or any financial loss resulting from a quote you submit.

9. Reputation & Business Standing

Noyo accepts no responsibility for any damage to your reputation, goodwill, or business standing arising from your participation on the Platform, interactions with customers, or any review, rating, or comment submitted by any user.

10. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Noyo's total liability to you for any claim whatsoever shall not exceed the amount of any subscription or listing fees paid by you to Noyo in the 30 days preceding the claim. Noyo shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential, special, or punitive damages of any kind.

11. Your Own Enquiries

You are solely responsible for conducting your own independent enquiries, verification, and due diligence in respect of every customer, job site, transaction, and piece of equipment. Do not rely solely on information provided through this Platform. Seek independent legal, financial, or technical advice where appropriate.

12. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of New South Wales, Australia. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of New South Wales.

📋 Noyo Platform — Customer Terms & Conditions ▼ read before ticking

1. Platform Role — Introduction Only

Noyo Pty Ltd ("Noyo", "the Platform") operates solely as a digital introduction and lead-generation service. Noyo introduces your equipment hire enquiry to rental companies listed on the Platform. Noyo is not a party to any hire agreement, rental contract, or transaction between you and any rental company.

2. No Responsibility for Transactions

Noyo bears absolutely no responsibility or liability of any kind for: (a) any rental agreement, contract, or arrangement entered into between you and a rental company; (b) any payment you make or fail to make; (c) the creditworthiness or financial standing of any rental company; (d) disputes, disagreements, or legal proceedings between you and any rental company; (e) whether the equipment quoted is suitable for your intended purpose.

3. Wrong or Unsuitable Equipment

Noyo accepts no responsibility if equipment supplied to you is unsuitable, incorrect, defective, or fails to meet your requirements. It is your sole responsibility to verify with the rental company that the equipment is appropriate for your specific application, site conditions, and regulatory requirements before hiring.

4. No Responsibility for Equipment Performance

Noyo accepts no responsibility for equipment breakdown, malfunction, failure, accident, injury, property damage, or any loss arising from the use, operation, or condition of hired equipment. All such matters are solely between you and the rental company.

5. Transport Costs — Estimates Only

All distances and transport cost estimates displayed on this Platform are approximate estimates only. These figures are not accurate and must not be relied upon as actual transport quotes. Actual transport costs will be determined by the rental company and may differ significantly. You must obtain and verify actual transport costs from the rental company independently before accepting any quote.

6. Prices & Quotes — Not Binding on Noyo

All prices, quotes, and rates displayed or communicated through the Platform are provided by rental companies and are not verified, endorsed, or guaranteed by Noyo. Prices are indicative only. Noyo accepts no responsibility for any pricing error, change, or discrepancy.

7. No Guarantee of Machine Availability

Noyo does not guarantee that any particular machine, type of equipment, or rental company will be available to service your enquiry. Machine availability is subject to rental company stock, location, and scheduling.

8. Damage to Equipment

You are solely responsible for any damage to equipment during the hire period in accordance with the hire agreement you enter into with the rental company. Noyo has no involvement in, and accepts no liability for, any claim for equipment damage.

9. Your Own Research

You acknowledge that this Platform provides general information and introductions only. You are solely responsible for conducting your own independent research, verification, and due diligence regarding any rental company, equipment, price, contract, and site requirements. Do not rely solely on information displayed on this Platform. Seek independent legal, financial, safety, or technical advice where appropriate.

10. Reputation & Third Parties

Noyo accepts no responsibility for any damage to your reputation, business, or any third-party claims arising from your use of equipment hired through the Platform.

11. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Noyo's total liability to you for any claim whatsoever shall not exceed $100 AUD. Noyo shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential, special, or punitive damages of any kind.

12. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of New South Wales, Australia. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of New South Wales.

📋 NOYO Platform Disclaimer
Customer-Stated Requirements — For Record Purposes The above specifications were entered by the customer at the time of submitting this enquiry. NOYO acts as a marketplace platform only. NOYO makes no representation as to the suitability, fitness for purpose, or availability of any machine listed. It is the sole responsibility of the customer to verify that the selected machine is appropriate for their specific application, site conditions, load, and regulatory requirements. It is the sole responsibility of the rental company to confirm machine specifications, load charts, compliance, and suitability before accepting this enquiry. Neither NOYO nor any third party accepts liability for any outcome resulting from reliance on information submitted through this platform.

➕ Add Machine from Spec Sheet

      
Upload a manufacturer PDF, brochure, or photo. Claude reads all specifications — capacity, height, reach, jib, on tyres/outriggers/tracks, load chart zones, dimensions, engine — and fills the form. Review, edit, then save directly to the machine database.

🏢 Business Registration Required

        
To send enquiries to rental companies, we need to verify your business. Please complete your Australian business details below — this is a one-time step.

      

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

      

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

      

      
      

        

          
          
          

        

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

      

      
      
      
      

        
        
        

          ⚠️ Choose honestly. If you set 200 km but can't actually service that distance cost-effectively, you'll receive enquiries you can't win. Transport costs are shown to customers — they can see if your quote is uncompetitive due to distance.
        

      

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

      

      

        🔒 Your business details are used only to verify your identity with rental companies and will never be sold or shared with third parties.
